<!--
BEFORE SUBMITTING: Read every word of this template. PRs that leave
sections blank, contain multiple unrelated changes, or show no evidence
of human involvement will be closed without review.
-->

## What problem are you trying to solve?
<!-- Describe the specific problem you encountered. What broke? What
     failed? What was the user experience that motivated this?

     "Improving" something is not a problem statement. Be specific:
     what session data was wrong, what search returned bad results,
     what dashboard view was misleading, what CLI command failed? -->

## What does this PR change?
<!-- 1-3 sentences. What, not why — the "why" belongs above. -->

## Is this change appropriate for this plugin?
<!-- claude-code-sessions is a session intelligence plugin: search,
     analytics, timeline, and task management across Claude Code sessions.
     Ask yourself:

     - Does this relate to session data, search, analytics, or task
       management?
     - Is this personal configuration or workflow preference?
     - Does this integrate or promote a third-party service?

     If your change adds personal configuration, team-specific workflow,
     or third-party integration, it does not belong here. -->

## What alternatives did you consider?
<!-- What other approaches did you try or evaluate before landing on this
     one? Why were they worse? If you didn't consider alternatives, say so
     — but know that's a red flag. -->

## Does this PR contain multiple unrelated changes?
<!-- If yes: stop. Split it into separate PRs. Bundled PRs will be closed.
     If you believe the changes are related, explain the dependency. -->

## Existing PRs
- [ ] I have reviewed all open AND closed PRs for duplicates or prior art
- Related PRs: <!-- #number, #number, or "none found" -->

<!-- If a related closed PR exists, explain what's different about your
     approach and why it should succeed where the other didn't. -->

## Environment tested

| Bun version | OS | Claude Code version |
|-------------|----|---------------------|
|             |    |                     |

## Testing
<!-- What tests were added or modified? Paste the relevant output from
     `bun test` below. If no tests were added, explain why.

     "It works" is not testing. Show test output. -->

```
<paste bun test output here>
```

## Human review
- [ ] A human has reviewed the COMPLETE proposed diff before submission

STOP. If the checkbox above is not checked, do not submit this PR.

PRs will be closed without review if they:
- Show no evidence of human involvement
- Contain multiple unrelated changes
- Promote or integrate third-party services
- Submit personal configuration as plugin changes
- Leave required sections blank or use placeholder text
